title: Open Parties and Claims PvP Support
description: Allows to disable pvp within a party with a personal config per-player.
body:
Open Parties and Claims PvP Support

 

A small mod that allows to disable PvP within party members, while also adding a personal toggle using the /opacpvp command.

Requires Faux Custom Entity Data in Fabric.

 

 ⭐ Features ⭐

 

Disable PvP within Party Members

Adding this mod will disable PvP between party members

 

Personal PvP Toggle (Fabric Only)

Using the /opacpvp command you can toggle your personal party PvP.

If you fight against a party member, both of you need to have the personal PvP enabled to damage yourselves.

Default values can be changed in the config, and this whole feature can be disabled in the config.
